——— PARANOIA 
Exactly what a weapon does when it malfunctions depends on the weapon. Each ‘weapon has a characteristic malfunction; these are described in the equipment section (see 
pages 79 through 82). I Remedying Weapon 
Malfunctions 
‘The unpleasant effects of a weapon malfunc- tion can sometimes be prevented or remedied by the swift application of an appropriate ‘weapon skill, The user can immediately make a second skill ol, using the same sill he uses ‘hen firing, to attempt to remedy the malfunc tion, A successful roll means he has. The ‘weapon descriptions (pages 79 through 82), describe malfunction repair in more detail (Typically really experimental equipment can- rot be repaired.) 
Miniatures & Stuff 
Wi Sex is All in the Mind 
_and so is Paranoia combat. In some games, you put miniatures or cardstock figures on the table and carefully measure how far they can ‘move and at what range they'te fring and stuf Tike that, However, let's remember that this is allimaginary; the guys onthe table arent zap- ping lasers at one another, and ifthe amemaster says “it's three meters away’ its three meters away, and we don't care if your ruler says its more oF less. ‘On the other hand, i's kind of fun to idle around with litle figures, and they're colorful and provide a visual focus to what’ otherwise ’ pretty abstract game. So if you like, go ahead land use figures, But remember also how the Dramatic Tactical System works; what the amemaster says goes, so don't get hung up Ieasuring every last faction of an inch and 
tracing accurate lines of sight and so on.
